name: Pull request
about: Merge contents of other branch to dev

labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Summary**
A clear and concise description of what have been done on this branch.

**Feature Category**
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Other (e.g. Documentation)

**Proposed Changes**
A clear and concise list of what have been done on this branch.
- Add '...'
- Remove '....'
- Modify '....'


### Approval
- [ ] "I have tested this feature"
- [ ] "I have reviewed the code"
- [ ] "Unit tests have succeeded"
- [ ] "I have not introduced any new known bugs"
- [ ] "I have filled out the PR template fully"
- [ ] "I have updated the tests"
